scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w lsp-server && npm run build -w vscode-extension
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w shared && npm run clean -w lsp-server && npm run clean -w vscode-extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w lsp-server && npm run test -w vscode-extension
scripts.publish:vscode: npm run publish:vsce -w vscode-extension && npm run publish:ovsx -w vscode-extension
scripts.publish:lsp: npm run build -w lsp-server && npm publish -w lsp-server
